name: provenance: fetched_at must be ISO-8601 UTC (Z suffix); local timezones rejected
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00-05:00
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > rule.yaml
